program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Inventory the no-write validation command matrix surfaces required to verify RP00 Product Constitution And AI Control Plane planning and later implementation.
claude_questions: Does validation_command_matrix_scope_inventory bind to RP00.P00.M07.S01 and stay scope-inventory only rather than claiming acceptance gate completion for all of M07?

Does it include the required no-write validation surfaces for the control-plane contract, spec requirement ledger, product contract, weighted ledger, full microphase plan, goal closeout protocol, and node test suite?

Does validation_command_matrix include the concrete commands npm run rp00:control-plane:validate, npm run spec:requirements:validate, npm run validate, npm run weighted:validate, npm run fullplan:validate, npm run goal:closeout:validate, and npm test with writes_product_state=false?
Does the scope explicitly exclude generation or mutating commands from closeout evidence?
Does the subphase preserve H00 Hermes evidence, C00 Claude review, no-real-data, human approval boundaries, and the next boundary RP00.P00.M07.S02?

finding_routing.P0_BLOCKER: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P1_MUST_FIX: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P2_SHOULD_FIX: fix now or defer with owner, target RP/subphase, and rationale
finding_routing.P3_NOTE: record or defer with owner and target phase
